name: Stakeholder-Focused Colors
description: Color scheme based on stakeholder roles and audiences

colorGroups.label: Architect/Design
colorGroups.description: System architecture, design patterns, technical strategy (Purple - #A020F0)

colorGroups.label: Security Team
colorGroups.description: Security operations, penetration testing, vulnerability management (Red - #FF0000)

colorGroups.label: QA/Testing
colorGroups.description: Test plans, QA procedures, validation frameworks (Yellow - #FFFF00)

colorGroups.label: Product/Business
colorGroups.description: Product requirements, business logic, feature specs (Green - #00FF00)

colorGroups.label: Executive/Leadership
colorGroups.description: Executive summaries, strategic decisions, business impact (Light Orange - #FFA000)

colorGroups.label: Compliance/Legal
colorGroups.description: Compliance requirements, legal considerations, audit trails (Brown - #B45F06)

instructions: Filter graph by stakeholder role for targeted information
Use for access control and information architecture planning
stakeholderViews: Developers: Focus on implementation and code architecture
Product Owners: View business logic and feature relationships
End Users: Navigate user-facing documentation only
